
## dependency v hazard {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /pipeline/_hazardVDepEx.qmd >}}

## alt exercise {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /pipeline/_forwardPathsEx2.qmd >}}

## diminishing return plots {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /pipeline/_deeperPipelinePlots.qmd >}}

## effect of branch prediction {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /pipeline/_predEffect.qmd >}}
